clauses.statement: Preflight never creates or mutates gate results, waivers, review lifecycle records, or decision records; its only writes are operator-equivalent artifacts (verification status artifacts, story catalog entries).
clauses.rationale: Preflight repairs evidence shape, never evidence truth (Story RPA-CONTRACT-001).

story_refs.text_snippet: RPA-S-3 preflight does not create or change gate verdicts, waivers, or review verdicts

clauses.statement: Every auto_fix output is schema-compatible with its hand-made counterpart and accepted at the same strength (a generated status artifact makes the verify record cross-check verified, promoting spine strength to strong).
clauses.rationale: Auto-fix parity with manual artifacts (Story RPA-CONTRACT-002).

story_refs.text_snippet: RPA-S-2 auto_fix outputs are schema-compatible and accepted strong/resolved

test_refs.case: verify-status-artifact: passing record without artifact gets a generated status artifact

clauses.statement: Recipe detections are pure functions of on-disk repository state and perform no network calls or LLM invocations.

test_refs.case: clean story: preflight is a no-op

clauses.statement: When none of the registered conditions hold, preflight writes nothing, reports detected:false for every recipe, and leaves downstream autopilot behavior identical.

test_refs.case: clean story: preflight is a no-op

clauses.statement: A recipe that throws during detection or fails during auto_fix is reported with action_taken:"failed" and never aborts preflight or the autopilot run.

test_refs.case: failure isolation: a recipe that throws is reported failed

clauses.statement: Adding a recipe requires only appending a registry entry; the report lists every registered recipe exactly once per run, in registry order.

test_refs.case: open registry: a seventh recipe added by append runs after the existing six

clauses.statement: Given a passing verify record without a status artifact, when preflight runs, then a status artifact is generated from the recorded exit code and the record's spine strength evaluates to strong.
Given a seventh registry entry added in a test, when preflight runs, then it executes after the existing six with no changes to them.

test_refs.case: S-002 a seventh registry entry runs after the existing six

clauses.statement: When pr autopilot runs the preflight workflow, each recipe transitions through detected status to auto_fix applied, next_command suggested, or failed state, and the autopilot flow resumes downstream phases without abort.
clauses.rationale: Workflow state transitions of the preflight phase inside pr autopilot (RPA-CONTRACT-005 failure isolation expressed as flow states).

story_refs.text_snippet: レシピ失敗は action_taken failed で続行（preflightで全体を止めない）

test_refs.case: S-003 preflight workflow transitions recipe status to failed without aborting the autopilot flow

diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Autopilot["pr autopilot"] --> Preflight["preflight phase (first)"]
  Preflight --> Registry["recipe registry (ordered)"]
  Registry --> Detect["detection(repo state, story id)"]
  Detect -- auto_fix --> Fix["apply fix, record artifacts"]
  Detect -- next_command --> Suggest["record exact command + reason"]
  Detect -- not detected --> Skip["detected: false"]
  Fix --> Report["preflight section in autopilot report"]
  Suggest --> Report
  Skip --> Report
  Report --> Phases["existing autopilot phases (unchanged)"]
diagrams.rationale: Preflight phase runs first and writes the preflight section before existing autopilot phases (Spec diagram).

diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Autopilot["pr autopilot"] --> Preflight["preflight phase"]
  Preflight --> Registry["recipe registry (detect only reads on-disk state)"]
  Registry -. must not call .-> Network["network / remote APIs"]
  Registry -. must not call .-> LLM["LLM / subagent dispatch"]
  Registry -. must not mutate .-> Verdicts["gate results / waivers / review lifecycles (RPA-CONTRACT-001)"]
  Registry -- auto_fix --> Fix["writes artifacts operators already produce by hand"]
  Fix -. must stay within .-> Boundary[".vibepro/ + declared spec/story paths only"]
  Registry -- detection failure --> Isolate["action_taken: failed, run continues (RPA-CONTRACT-005)"]
  Fix --> CleanStory["clean story: byte-identical no-op (RPA-CONTRACT-004)"]
diagrams.rationale: Preflight detection/auto_fix boundary: no network/LLM calls, no verdict mutation, writes confined to .vibepro/ and declared spec/story paths (threat model for the preflight phase).

diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> NotDetected: detection() false
  [*] --> Detected: detection() true
  Detected --> Planned: dry_run (auto_fix deferred, no writes)
  Detected --> AutoFixed: auto_fix applied (artifacts recorded)
  Detected --> Suggested: next_command emitted (exact command + reason)
  Detected --> Failed: detect/fix threw (action_taken failed, run continues)
  AutoFixed --> [*]
  Suggested --> [*]
  Planned --> [*]
  Failed --> [*]
  NotDetected --> [*]
